meta.title: Review Writing Skeletons
meta.description: Complete skeleton structures for Cambridge B2/C1 review writing

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: State which documentary you watched
Mention the channel or platform
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Visual & Technical Quality
lines: Describe the cinematography or visual approach
Explain what made it technically impressive
Give a specific example of stunning footage

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Content & Message
lines: Explain the main topic or argument
Describe what you learned
Comment on the environmental or social message

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State clearly whether you recommend it
Specify who would enjoy it most
End with a strong closing statement

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the artist and venue
Mention when you attended
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Performance Quality
lines: Describe the artist's live performance
Explain what made it special or unique
Give examples of standout moments

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Atmosphere & Production
lines: Describe the stage design and visuals
Comment on the crowd atmosphere
Mention any technical or production highlights

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend seeing them live
Specify who would enjoy this artist
End with a memorable closing thought

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the restaurant and location
Mention the type of cuisine
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Food Quality
lines: Describe specific dishes you tried
Comment on taste, presentation, and authenticity
Mention portion sizes and value

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Atmosphere & Service
lines: Describe the décor and ambiance
Comment on the service quality
Mention any standout aspects of the experience

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend it
Specify what occasions it's suitable for
End with a strong closing statement

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the restaurant and occasion
Mention why you chose this place
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Special Occasion Features
lines: Describe what made it suitable for celebrating
Mention any special touches or attention
Comment on the romantic or festive atmosphere

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Food & Service Excellence
lines: Describe the quality of the meal
Comment on the attentiveness of service
Mention any memorable moments or gestures

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend for special occasions
Specify what type of celebrations suit this venue
End with a memorable closing thought

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the activity and location
Mention the duration and organization
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Instruction & Facilities
lines: Describe the quality of coaching or instruction
Comment on equipment and facilities
Mention skill progression or learning outcomes

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Experience & Atmosphere
lines: Describe the social atmosphere and group dynamic
Comment on accommodation and meals
Mention evening activities or free time

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend this experience
Specify what fitness or skill level is needed
End with an enthusiastic closing thought

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the guidebook and destination
Mention the publisher or edition
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Content & Coverage
lines: Describe the depth and breadth of information
Comment on hidden gems vs tourist spots
Mention practical details like maps and transport

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Usability & Format
lines: Describe how easy it is to navigate
Comment on the app or digital features
Mention offline capabilities or special tools

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend it
Specify what type of traveler would benefit most
End with a practical closing statement

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the book and author
Mention the main topic or premise
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Key Ideas & Content
lines: Describe the main concepts or arguments
Explain what makes the approach unique
Give examples of practical advice offered

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Practicality & Impact
lines: Comment on how actionable the advice is
Describe any research or evidence provided
Mention the writing style and readability

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend it
Specify who would benefit most from reading it
End with a thoughtful closing statement

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the app and its main purpose
Mention when you started using it
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Core Functionality
lines: Describe the main features or tools
Explain what makes it effective or useful
Give examples of how you use it daily

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Design & User Experience
lines: Comment on the interface and ease of use
Mention gamification or motivation features
Describe the free vs paid features

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend it
Specify who would find it most useful
End with a strong closing thought

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the film and director
Mention the genre and basic premise
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Story & Performances
lines: Describe the plot without spoilers
Comment on the acting performances
Mention character development or themes

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Technical & Creative Elements
lines: Describe cinematography and visual style
Comment on soundtrack and sound design
Mention any standout technical achievements

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend it
Specify what type of viewer would enjoy it
End with a memorable closing line

skeleton.title: Introduction
lines: Name the game and platform
Mention the genre and basic concept
Give your overall impression

skeleton.title: Feature 1 — Gameplay & Mechanics
lines: Describe the core gameplay loop
Explain what makes it engaging or addictive
Give examples of key features or modes

skeleton.title: Feature 2 — Style & Experience
lines: Comment on art style and atmosphere
Describe soundtrack and audio design
Mention difficulty level and accessibility

skeleton.title: Recommendation
lines: State whether you'd recommend it
Specify what type of gamer would enjoy it
End with an enthusiastic closing thought
